title: Mildly Crunchy Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A light and crunchy Brazilian dish featuring sesame seed oil and simmered chicken, served in scallop shells. This paleo-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together sesame seed oil, coconut milk, lime juice, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the chicken.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Simmer the cooked chicken in the marinade for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the chicken in scallop shells, garnished with additional sesame seeds if desired.
